steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a difference between konbu and arame. Konbu's umami was rated moderate; arame's was rated high. The answer should call out this difference.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
(C) says "the latter's [arame's] umami flavor is more intense" — that's the direct difference.

(A) only states a similarity (both are brown seaweeds). (B) and (D) lump the two together without contrasting their umami intensities.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
